facts.statement: The Eiffel Tower stands over 400 meters tall
facts.actual: 300 m architectural height; 324 m to the current antenna tip

facts.statement: The Eiffel Tower weighs over 50,000 tonnes
facts.actual: Total weight approximately 10,100 tonnes (iron weight: 7,300 tonnes)

facts.statement: The Eiffel Tower contains over 5 million rivets
The Eiffel Tower is made up of over 10,000 different parts
More than 10 workers died during the construction of the Eiffel Tower
